prompt: PM this bug — we had @TransactionalEventListener(AFTER_COMMIT) on PricingInitializer but it wasn't persisting because there was no active transaction after commit. had to add @Transactional(propagation = REQUIRES_NEW)

assertions.name: has_all_sections
assertions.description: Contains sections: Summary, Timeline, Symptom, Root Cause, Fix Applied, Impact, Lessons Learned, Prevention

assertions.name: has_severity
assertions.description: Includes a severity rating (Critical, High, Medium, or Low)

assertions.name: has_prevention_checkboxes
assertions.description: Prevention section has at least one '- [ ]' action item

assertions.name: mentions_after_commit
assertions.description: Root cause mentions AFTER_COMMIT running outside the transaction boundary

assertions.name: explains_transaction_lifecycle
assertions.description: Explains why the original transaction is no longer active when the listener runs
